Saturday, July 18 | 5-8 PM

Bouldering Sucks

After a 6-year hiatus, our annual rope competition is back! All skill levels welcome. Competitor registration includes food and a limited-edition tee!

‍

Sign Up
The first weekend of every month

First Weekend Deals at Rock Mill

Enjoy unlimited climbing, yoga classes, and discounted drinks on the first weekend of each month at Rock Mill.

Get the First Weekend Day Pass
Mondays & Thursdays | September - November 2026

Youth Climbing Club

Youth Climbing Clubs are at the heart of what we're all about at Rock Mill: sharing the love of climbing with the next generation.

‍

SENDERS | Designed for youth ages 9–12, Senders Climbing Club helps climbers build on foundational skills & learn more advanced techniques.

‍

SEEKERS | If your child is newer to climbing, the Seekers Climbing Club is a great place to start. Seekers (ages 8-12) learn introductory climbing techniques, terminology, and safety tips in a fun, community-style environment.

Learn More & Sign Up
Wednesdays | 9:00 AM - Noon

Co-Work Wednesdays

Say goodbye to the midweek slump ☕️

‍

Work remotely at Basecamp on Wednesday mornings and enjoy:

• Free drip coffee for members

• $2 off all specialty drinks

• $5 off day passes

‍

Sip something good, stay motivated by those around you, and sneak in a climb/workout while you’re at it every Wednesday from 9 AM–Noon.

Get the Co-Work Wednesdays Day Pass
First Friday of the month

College Night

Come hang out and climb with other college students and enjoy $15 day passes on the first Friday of the month.

Register
Saturday, September 12

Call for Vendors | Rock the Mill Fest 2026

We’re currently seeking vendors, musicians, and community organizations for ROCK THE MILL FEST 2026, our annual summer celebration of adventure, wellness and this wonderful community.

🕐 Vendors w/ tables: 11:30-5 PM
🎸 Live musicians: 5-8 PM

Apply to be a Vendor
Fridays | 9:00 - 11:00 AM

Youth Open Climb

Whether you're homeschooling or just have the day off, this is a great way to have some fun and get your kids moving. $12 for the first child, and $10 for each additional child.

Sign Up
Stories from your local climbing community

The Rock Mill Beta Blog

The prep work and the pivots, the mishaps and the golden moments, the training, gear, maps, meals and the people you met along the way. The Rock Mill Beta Blog is a space to delight in the adventures of fellow Rock Mill climbers – and get some beta for your next trip. We hope you find threads of inspiration from these stories, and that when you’re ready to plan your own adventure, you’ll know who to ask.

Read More
